name: Cheddar Chili Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Garlic should be seeded and finely chopped. Preheat oven to 325°F.
Butter a 9-inch springform pan.
Mix breadcrumbs and 1/4 cup cheddar. Sprinkle mixture into the pan, turning to coat. Refrigerate.
Dice about half of the ham; reserve remaining slices. Mix diced ham with remaining ingredients in a blender or processor until smooth.
Pour slightly more than half of the filling into the prepared pan. Top with reserved ham slices in an even layer. Cover with the remaining filling.
Set pan on a baking sheet. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
Turn off the oven and cool the cheesecake about 1 hour with the door ajar. Transfer the cheesecake to a rack. Remove the sides of the pan. Cool to room temperature before serving.
